testsuite.name: RESEARCHMANTRA_AUTOMATION.AUTOMATION.Login_Screen_Tests

testcase.name: testLoginScreenFlow
testcase.system-out: -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7152162425 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 301542 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Waiting 4 seconds for Dashboard/Registration routing... -> Checking routing destination... -> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow... -> Entering Data: Krishnafas | krishnaaddak@test.com | Warangalda -> Testing Gender Radio Buttons (Male -> Female)... -> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female. -> Preparing to click Register... -> Submitting Registration Form... -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: Krishnafas -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.

testsuite.system-out:
⏳ APPIUM IS CLEANING DEVICE AND INSTALLING FRESH APK... ✅ APPIUM SESSION ESTABLISHED - STABILITY MODE ENGAGED!
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLoginScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7152162425 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 301542 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Waiting 4 seconds for Dashboard/Registration routing... -> Checking routing destination... -> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow... -> Entering Data: Krishnafas | krishnaaddak@test.com | Warangalda -> Testing Gender Radio Buttons (Male -> Female)... -> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female. -> Preparing to click Register... -> Submitting Registration Form... -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: Krishnafas -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testLoginScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 351.11 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testHeaderAndNotifications ======================================================== -> Starting Header & Notifications Verification... -> Step 1: Checking User Profile Name in Header. -> Profile Name verified in header: Krishnafas -> Step 2: Checking Notification Bell. -> Clicked Notification Bell successfully. -> Returned to Dashboard from Notifications. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testHeaderAndNotifications -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 17.794 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testPerformanceAnalyticsSection ======================================================== -> Starting Performance Analytics Verification... -> Step 1: Scrolling to Performance Section. -> Performance Header and SEBI Disclosure verified. -> Step 2: Testing Analytics Filter Chips. -> Locating Analytics Chip: Nifty Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Nifty Positional -> Performance data verified for Nifty Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: Midcap Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Midcap Positional -> Performance data verified for Midcap Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: MCX Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: MCX Positional -> Performance data verified for MCX Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: Long term Goal -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Long term Goal -> Performance data verified for Long term Goal -> Performance Analytics section behaves correctly. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testPerformanceAnalyticsSection -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 23.505 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDashboardElementsAndNav ======================================================== -> Starting General Content & Navigation Verification... -> Step 1: Checking Core Trade Category Cards. -> Visible: MCX Positional -> Visible: Long term Goal Oriented -> Visible: Nifty Positional -> Visible: Midcap Positional -> Step 2: Checking Explore Promotional Banners. -> Promotional Banners scrolled into view and verified. -> Step 3: Testing Bottom Navigation Functional Clicks. -> Navigated to 'Trades' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Blogs' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Tools' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Profile' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Explore' tab successfully. -> Dashboard Content & Navigation test completed successfully. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testDashboardElementsAndNav -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 27.588 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Dynamic Trades Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Trades Bottom Tab. -> Step 1: Extracting dynamic product list from the app... -> Dynamically found 4 products: [MCX Positional, Nifty Positional, Midcap Positional, Long term Goal Oriented] -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: MCX Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: MCX Positional -> Could not click top tab: Home -> Found Home Service Card for: MCX Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: MCX Positional -> Could not click top tab: Live Trades -> Could not locate or click product chip: MCX Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab. -> Could not click sub-tab: Details -> Live Trades UI is blank or unrecognizable. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 137.39 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow ======================================================== -> Step 1: Navigating to Trades -> Home Tab. -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING FUNNEL FOR: MCX Positional -> Opening Product Details. -> Payment Flow Test Failed: Appium clicked the card, but Flutter ignored it 3 times. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 139.521 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications ======================================================== -> Verifying Signal Distribution Logic. -> Opening the first available product to check for Live Commentary... -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 93.469 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testBlogsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Blogs Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Blogs Tab. -> Step 1: Verifying Blog Card Content. -> First Blog Card Content loaded instantly. -> Step 2: Testing Like Toggle. -> Like/Comment buttons not found. The UI layout might have shifted. -> Step 3: Verifying Create Post (+) Business Logic. -> ✅ BUSINESS LOGIC VERIFIED: User has no active product/trial. 'Create Post' (+) button is correctly HIDDEN. -> Blogs Screen & Business Logic verification completed perfectly. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testBlogsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 60.74 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testToolsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Tools Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Tools Tab. -> Tools Screen Test Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Retirement Plans (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testToolsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 30.551 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testProfileAndSettingsFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Profile & Settings Verification. -> Step 1: Navigating to Profile Tab. -> Profile Main Landing UI loaded. -> Step 2: Testing Personal Details Update logic. -> Profile & Settings Flow Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Update (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testProfileAndSettingsFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 45.875 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
